sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: A king of the Man tribe. Rebelled with Yong Kai against Shu, but surrendered to Zhuge Liang, entered into service under him, and overthrew Yong Kai and Zhu Bao. Later, Zhuge Liang appointed him magistrate of the Yi territory.

full_text:
Gao Ding 高定
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Ding (高定)was born in Yuexi. Shu vassal that revolted in the southern Man region. Gao Ding was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and Nanman. Gao Ding lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:87
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Aking of the Man tribe. Rebelled with Yong Kai against Shu, but surrendered to Zhuge Liang, entered into service under him, and overthrew Yong Kai and Zhu Bao. Later, Zhuge Liang appointed him magistrate of the Yi territory.
